calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Vacated

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS Granted. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Resonses To Form Interogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Pltf'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance on TUE-OCT-08-2013:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. [415.922.5939] by special appearance for plaintiff RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re: Plaintiff RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC'S Motion For Order Compelling Resonses To Form Interogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiff's Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanctions.

The Pro Tem Judge has issued the following tentative ruling: NO OPPOSITION PAPERS HAVE BEEN FILED; ACCORDINGLY THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
1. MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, EXCEPT AS TO ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE, TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. SUCH RESPONSES SHALL BE FILED WITHIN 20 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.
2. MOTION TO DEEMED THE MATTERS ADMITTED IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION IS GRANTED, UNLESS DEFENDANT FILES FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHIN 20 DAY FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.
3. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $260.00 ARE ASSESSED AS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND HER COUNSEL, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
